log.before:
[APPROVED]
All integration and functional tests were executed successfully on NewsPortal app.
- Root redirects correctly to dashboard.
- Dashboard shows featured and trending articles with buttons for navigation.
- Article catalog filters by category and search text properly.
- Article details page renders with bookmark button; bookmarking feature persists and can be undone.
- Bookmarks page lists bookmarked articles and removing bookmarks works.
- Comments page filters comments by article; comments can be added via write-comment page.
- Trending articles page displays filtering by time period and navigates correctly.
- Category page displays articles and has expected sort buttons.
- Search page returns correct results or empty result message as applicable.
- All pages render expected templates and context variables.

No errors or failures detected in tests.
[APPROVED]

log.before:
[APPROVED]

Comprehensive end-to-end integration and functional tests have been conducted for the NewsPortal application covering all specified features:

1. All nine pages (Dashboard, Catalog, Article Details, Bookmarks, Comments, Write Comment, Trending, Category, Search Results) were visited and confirmed for correct HTTP responses and proper template rendering.
2. Navigation flows between pages, including redirects and button-based navigations, work as designed.
3. Data from all relevant text data files (articles.txt, categories.txt, bookmarks.txt, comments.txt, trending.txt) were validated to appear correctly in the respective pages.
4. Dynamic behaviors tested include:
   - Filtering and searching in Article Catalog.
   - Bookmarking and bookmark removal with correct persistence.
   - Comment listing, filtering, and successful submission with validation.
   - Trending articles filtering by time period.
   - Category page article sorting UI elements present.
   - Search functionality returns accurate results and no-results message.
5. Page content elements including IDs, page titles, and template context variables were verified to match expectations.

No failures, errors, or inconsistencies were detected.

All tests passed successfully.
[APPROVED]

log.before:
[APPROVED]
Ran 10 tests. Failures: 0. Errors: 0.

Summary:
- Verified navigation flows between all nine pages: Dashboard, Catalog, Article Details, Bookmarks, Comments, Write Comment, Trending, Category, and Search Results.
- Confirmed display of data read from all data files (articles.txt, categories.txt, bookmarks.txt, comments.txt, trending.txt).
- Tested dynamic behaviors: searching and category filtering in catalog, bookmarking articles and removing bookmarks, listing and filtering comments, submitting new comments, trending articles filtering, category page article display, and search page results.
- Confirmed content rendering with correct element IDs, titles, and template context variables.
- All operations involving data persistence for bookmarks and comments were validated.

No issues found. All tests passed successfully.
[APPROVED]
